children.text: upon request of an Exchange, advance determinations are made under with respect to the income eligibility of individuals enrolling in a qualified health plan in the individual market through the Exchange for the premium tax credit allowable under and the cost-sharing reductions under ;section 18081 of this titlesection 36B of title 26section 18071 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the Exchange and the Secretary of the Treasury of the advance determinations; and

children.label: i
children.text: the employer did not provide minimum essential coverage; or

children.label: ii
children.text: the employer provided such minimum essential coverage but it was determined under to either be unaffordable to the employee or not provide the required minimum actuarial value; andsection 36B(c)(2)(C) of title 26

the Secretary of the Treasury makes advance payments of such credit or reductions to the issuers of the qualified health plans in order to reduce the premiums payable by individuals eligible for such credit.

children.label: A
children.text: during the annual open enrollment period applicable to the individual (or such other enrollment period as may be specified by the Secretary); and

children.label: B
children.text: on the basis of the individual’s household income for the most recent taxable year for which the Secretary, after consultation with the Secretary of the Treasury, determines information is available.

children.label: A
children.text: allowing an individual claiming a decrease of 20 percent or more in income, or filing an application for unemployment benefits, to have eligibility for the credit determined on the basis of household income for a later period or on the basis of the individual’s estimate of such income for the taxable year; and

children.label: B
children.text: the determination of household income in cases where the taxpayer was not required to file a return of tax imposed by this chapter for the second preceding taxable year.

children.heading: Payment of premium tax credits and cost-sharing reductions
children.label: c Payment of premium tax credits and cost-sharing reductions

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary shall notify the Secretary of the Treasury and the Exchange through which the individual is enrolling of the advance determination under .section 18081 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury shall make the advance payment under this section of any premium tax credit allowed under to the issuer of a qualified health plan on a monthly basis (or such other periodic basis as the Secretary may provide).section 36B of title 26

children.label: i
children.text: reduce the premium charged the insured for any period by the amount of the advance payment for the period;

children.label: ii
children.text: notify the Exchange and the Secretary of such reduction;

children.label: iii
children.text: include with each billing statement the amount by which the premium for the plan has been reduced by reason of the advance payment; and

children.label: I
children.text: notify the Secretary of such nonpayment; and

children.label: II
children.text: allow a 3-month grace period for nonpayment of premiums before discontinuing coverage.

children.heading: Cost-sharing reductions
children.label: 3 Cost-sharing reductions
children.text: The Secretary shall also notify the Secretary of the Treasury and the Exchange under paragraph (1) if an advance payment of the cost-sharing reductions under is to be made to the issuer of any qualified health plan with respect to any individual enrolled in the plan. The Secretary of the Treasury shall make such advance payment at such time and in such amount as the Secretary specifies in the notice.section 18071 of this title

children.heading: No Federal payments for individuals not lawfully present
children.label: d No Federal payments for individuals not lawfully present
children.text: Nothing in this subtitle or the amendments made by this subtitle allows Federal payments, credits, or cost-sharing reductions for individuals who are not lawfully present in the United States.

children.heading: State flexibility
children.label: e State flexibility
children.text: Nothing in this subtitle or the amendments made by this subtitle shall be construed to prohibit a State from making payments to or on behalf of an individual for coverage under a qualified health plan offered through an Exchange that are in addition to any credits or cost-sharing reductions allowable to the individual under this subtitle and such amendments.
